markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Jo's Linear workflow for managing client projects.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Automate recurring work with Linear's recurring tasks.** For templated services like Strategy Sprints, this saves significant setup time.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [**Use a "pull" system for content production.** The Managing Editor updates Conan OS status to "In Production" on Fridays, giving CMs a live link to their Monday work without needing direct assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [**Standardize processes with internal docs.** Link to a "Standards & Processes" canvas in Slack channels to document client-specific quirks and avoid repetitive explanations.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [**Create Linear templates for key communications.** This will standardize client updates, handoffs, and requests for materials, saving time and ensuring consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Inefficient Project Management

  - [The current Linear project for Strategy Sprints is outdated, containing irrelevant tasks and incorrect stages.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [This leads to excessive back-and-forth communication and missed administrative tasks (e.g., sending sync agendas).](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

### Solution: Jo's Linear Workflow

  - [**Recurring Tasks:** Automate predictable work (e.g., weekly content generation, performance updates) to save setup time.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Use a consistent naming convention (e.g., `[Weekly]`) for clear identification.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
      - [Set all recurring tasks to appear on the same day (e.g., Friday) to create a focused batch-processing window.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [**Content Production "Pull" System:**](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [**Friday:** The Managing Editor updates Conan OS status to "In Production" and adds the live view link to the corresponding Linear ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Monday:** CMs access the ticket for their work; no direct assignments are needed.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [**Internal Communication & Documentation:**](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
      - [**Task Comments:** Used for all internal communication, including Google Doc links for content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**Slack:** Used for general discussion, with a "Standards & Processes" canvas in each client's internal channel to document unique guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### Recommendation: Linear Templates

  - [**Rationale:** Templates standardize repetitive communications, saving time and ensuring consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [**Suggested Templates:**](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [**Customer Communication:** For recurring updates.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [**Request for Materials:** For client requests.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**Handoff:** To guide the transfer of projects to execution pods.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nathalie:**](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [Rebuild the Strategy Sprint Linear project, incorporating recurring tasks and milestones.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [Create Linear templates for customer communication, material requests, and handoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/14dZx-dcf6H-fcV-eydfifFuLu9HmLg2?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
